{
  ProductActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductActivatorRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Product>(Create);

    static global::Product Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
    {
        var instance = new global::Product()
        {
            Id = values.TryGetValue("Id", out var v0) ? (int)v0! : default!,
        };
        if (values.TryGetValue("Name", out var sv0)) instance.Name = (string)sv0!;
        if (values.TryGetValue("Price", out var sv1)) instance.Price = (decimal)sv1!;
        if (values.TryGetValue("Sku", out var sv2)) instance.Sku = (string)sv2!;
        return instance;
    }
},
  ProductRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductRowReaderRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Product>(ReadRow);

    static global::Product ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
    {
        var instance = new global::Product()
        {
            Id = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadInt(cells[0], sharedStrings, 0, onError)
        };
        instance.Name = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[1], sharedStrings);
        instance.Price = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadDecimal(cells[2], sharedStrings, 2, onError);
        instance.Sku = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[3], sharedStrings);
        return instance;
    }
},
  ProductSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class ProductSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product> IdColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Product, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Id, configuration);

    public static void IdHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Product, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Id);
